selection_policy.en: Prefer real public spectral datasets that can be reproduced locally with official acquisition paths. Raw-local validation is allowed to use large files when licensing and storage are acceptable, but Git and the public app should only carry manifests, curated subsets, and compact derived assets.
selection_policy.es: Priorizar datasets espectrales publicos reales que puedan reproducirse localmente con rutas oficiales de adquisicion. La validacion local puede usar archivos grandes cuando licencia y almacenamiento lo permitan, pero Git y la app publica solo deben cargar manifiestos, subconjuntos curados y activos derivados compactos.

repository_strategy.en: Excellent first raw scene for a public repo. Small enough to keep locally if licensing and attribution are respected.
repository_strategy.es: Excelente primera escena cruda para un repo publico. Lo bastante pequena para mantenerla localmente si se respetan licencia y atribucion.

notes.en: Classic agricultural benchmark with enough bands to demonstrate quantization, band words, and topic mixtures without stressing the repository.
notes.es: Benchmark agricola clasico con suficientes bandas para demostrar cuantizacion, palabras por banda y mezclas de topicos sin tensionar el repositorio.

supervision.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
supervision.caveat: Labels support class/topic validation, not mineral or response-variable claims.

acquisition.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local unless separately approved; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

repository_strategy.en: Ideal for tiny demos, tests, and example notebooks.
repository_strategy.es: Ideal para demos pequenas, pruebas y notebooks de ejemplo.

notes.en: Very compact scene that is especially useful when the product needs one fully reproducible public sample under tight size limits.
notes.es: Escena muy compacta, especialmente util cuando el producto necesita una muestra publica completamente reproducible bajo limites de tamano estrictos.

supervision.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
supervision.caveat: Tiny footprint makes it ideal for validation experiments, but labels remain crop classes only.

acquisition.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local unless separately approved; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

repository_strategy.en: Large but still manageable as a single public raw file.
repository_strategy.es: Grande pero aun manejable como un unico archivo crudo publico.

notes.en: Urban texture and material transitions make it useful for showing that topics can capture regimes beyond agriculture.
notes.es: Las texturas urbanas y transiciones de materiales la vuelven util para mostrar que los topicos pueden capturar regimenes mas alla de la agricultura.

supervision.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
supervision.caveat: Urban classes support spatial/material comparison, but they are not laboratory material measurements.

acquisition.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local unless separately approved; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

repository_strategy.en: Still under the target threshold, but better treated as an optional raw asset.
repository_strategy.es: Aun bajo el umbral objetivo, pero mejor tratado como un activo crudo opcional.

notes.en: Useful when the story needs water, marsh, and vegetation transitions instead of only crop fields or urban materials.
notes.es: Util cuando la narrativa necesita transiciones entre agua, humedales y vegetacion en vez de solo cultivos o materiales urbanos.

supervision.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
supervision.caveat: Wetland classes enable label alignment; ecological or biophysical responses are not included.

acquisition.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local unless separately approved; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

repository_strategy.en: Technically within the target, but close enough to the limit that manifests or subsets are safer for routine development.
repository_strategy.es: Tecnicamente dentro del objetivo, pero lo bastante cerca del limite como para que manifiestos o subconjuntos sean mas seguros para el desarrollo rutinario.

notes.en: Good boundary case for the size policy and still attractive for diversity in vegetation and soil conditions.
notes.es: Buen caso limite para la politica de tamano y aun atractivo por su diversidad en vegetacion y condiciones de suelo.

supervision.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
supervision.caveat: Labels support validation, but the raw file is close enough to the size policy to prefer derived assets.

acquisition.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local by default; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

local_status.en: Downloaded locally and distilled into compact derived assets
local_status.es: Descargado localmente y destilado en activos derivados compactos

repository_strategy.en: Raw files remain excluded from Git; reproduce with `scripts/local.* fetch` and regenerate compact assets with `build-real`.
repository_strategy.es: Los archivos crudos siguen excluidos de Git; reproducir con `scripts/local.* fetch` y regenerar activos compactos con `build-real`.

notes.en: Full agricultural Salinas scene with 16 classes. It broadens the current Salinas-A subset without adding a heavy file.
notes.es: Escena agricola Salinas completa con 16 clases. Amplia el subconjunto Salinas-A actual sin agregar un archivo pesado.

supervision.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
supervision.caveat: Class labels are valid for topic-label association and supervised class tests only.

acquisition.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local unless separately approved; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

datasets.name: Cuprite reflectance
datasets.source: UPV/EHU Hyperspectral Remote Sensing Scenes / AVIRIS

local_status.en: Downloaded locally and distilled into compact derived assets
local_status.es: Descargado localmente y destilado en activos derivados compactos

repository_strategy.en: Keep raw Cuprite local for validation and publish only compact derived subsets and documented exports.
repository_strategy.es: Mantener Cuprite crudo local para validacion y publicar solo subconjuntos derivados compactos y exportaciones documentadas.

notes.en: High-value mineral and clay benchmark for the product's first serious workflow.
notes.es: Benchmark mineral y de arcillas de alto valor para el primer flujo serio del producto.

supervision.label_scope: no official ground-truth map is bundled in the current app payload
supervision.caveat: Topic strata and spectral-library neighbors are exploratory until calibrated wavelength and external mineral validation are added.

acquisition.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU and AVIRIS provenance; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled because the file is near the active size limit.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Commit only compact previews, topic summaries, and method metadata.

local_status.en: Downloaded locally and distilled into compact derived assets
local_status.es: Descargado localmente y destilado en activos derivados compactos

repository_strategy.en: Raw MATLAB files remain excluded from Git. The app tracks compact topic-stratum previews and JSON scene summaries only.
repository_strategy.es: Los archivos MATLAB crudos siguen excluidos de Git. La app versiona solo previews compactos de estratos por topico y resumenes JSON de escenas.

notes.en: Samson, Jasper Ridge, Urban, and Cuprite ROI scenes can support topic-mixture versus unmixing comparisons.
notes.es: Escenas ROI Samson, Jasper Ridge, Urban y Cuprite pueden apoyar comparaciones entre mezclas de topicos y unmixing.

supervision.label_scope: treated as unlabeled in the current app; support files may enable later reference comparisons
supervision.caveat: Use for topic-versus-unmixing comparisons, not for ground-truth class claims.

acquisition.license_note: Source files come from the public MUA_SparseUnmixing repository; keep provenance and verify redistribution before raw tracking.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Raw MATLAB files stay local; compact derived summaries are publishable.

repository_strategy.en: Keep only derived JSON and previews in Git. Fetch orthomosaics and raw captures on demand with the local pipeline.
repository_strategy.es: Mantener en Git solo JSON derivados y previews. Descargar ortomosaicos y capturas crudas bajo demanda con el pipeline local.

notes.en: Official 4-band field samples at 480, 550, 670, and 850 nm. Example 1 orthomosaic is about 18.2 MB and Example 2 is about 68.6 MB, so both stay inside the current per-file target.
notes.es: Muestras de campo oficiales de 4 bandas en 480, 550, 670 y 850 nm. El ortomosaico del Ejemplo 1 pesa aproximadamente 18.2 MB y el del Ejemplo 2 aproximadamente 68.6 MB, por lo que ambos quedan dentro del objetivo actual por archivo.

supervision.label_scope: no ground-truth class labels; strata are derived heuristics
supervision.caveat: NDVI and strata support exploratory comparison only; they are not field measurements.

acquisition.license_note: Use with MicaSense sample-data provenance; keep raw orthomosaics outside Git by default.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Commit derived JSON and previews only; fetch raw orthomosaics on demand.

repository_strategy.en: Do not commit the full archive. Keep a curated patch subset or a downloader script.
repository_strategy.es: No commitear el archivo completo. Mantener un subconjunto curado de parches o un script de descarga.

notes.en: Strong MSI complement to remote-sensing HSI scenes. Individual patches are tiny even if the full archive should stay external.
notes.es: Complemento MSI fuerte a las escenas HSI de teledeteccion. Los parches individuales son pequenos aunque el archivo completo deba mantenerse externo.

supervision.label_scope: patch-level land-cover labels after a curated subset is selected
supervision.caveat: Patch labels are not pixel labels; UI comparisons must not imply pixel-level ground truth.

acquisition.license_note: Verify subset packaging, citation, and redistribution terms before local ingestion.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Use a tiny curated Sentinel-2 patch subset or a reproducible downloader.

repository_strategy.en: Do not commit the full archive. Use metadata-driven class-balanced Sentinel-2 patch subsets after verifying license and patch layout.
repository_strategy.es: No commitear el archivo completo. Usar subconjuntos balanceados por clase de parches Sentinel-2 despues de verificar licencia y estructura.

notes.en: Large benchmark for multi-label land cover. It is valuable for proving transfer across urban, vegetation, agricultural, and water scenes.
notes.es: Benchmark grande para cobertura de suelo multi-etiqueta. Es valioso para probar transferencia entre escenas urbanas, vegetacion, agricultura y agua.

supervision.label_scope: patch-level multi-label land-cover annotations; pixel references require subset verification
supervision.caveat: Full archive is too large for the app; only a documented compact subset can be product-visible.

acquisition.license_note: Verify BigEarthNet v2.0 license and selected patch metadata before local ingestion.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Keep archive external; publish only selected patch metadata and compact derived summaries.

repository_strategy.en: Use curated subsets only after verifying official download location, license, and per-file sizes.
repository_strategy.es: Usar solo subconjuntos curados despues de verificar ubicacion oficial de descarga, licencia y tamanos por archivo.

notes.en: Useful for showing the method on high-spatial-resolution UAV crop and land-cover scenes, not only classic airborne benchmarks.
notes.es: Util para mostrar el metodo en escenas UAV de alta resolucion espacial para cultivos y cobertura de suelo, no solo benchmarks aerotransportados clasicos.

supervision.label_scope: reported crop/land-cover labels require official source and license verification
supervision.caveat: No app claim until source files, labels, and redistribution rights are verified.

acquisition.license_note: Current manifest points to the paper; official download and redistribution rules still need verification.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Do not ingest or expose in the app until a source manifest is complete.

repository_strategy.en: Catalog for cross-scene experiments. Verify canonical source, license, and sizes before any local ingestion.
repository_strategy.es: Catalogar para experimentos cross-scene. Verificar fuente canonica, licencia y tamanos antes de cualquier ingestion local.

notes.en: Candidate for testing whether topic structures remain stable when scene geography changes.
notes.es: Candidato para probar si las estructuras de topicos se mantienen estables cuando cambia la geografia de la escena.

supervision.label_scope: class labels are candidate metadata until canonical source and files are verified
supervision.caveat: Do not use for cross-scene validation claims until source, labels, and splits are reproduced locally.

acquisition.license_note: Verify canonical HyRANK source, license, and per-file sizes before ingestion.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Catalog-only until a reproducible acquisition manifest exists.

repository_strategy.en: Keep the collection external and later track selected patch IDs plus compact derived topic summaries.
repository_strategy.es: Mantener la coleccion externa y luego rastrear IDs de parches seleccionados junto con resumenes compactos de topicos.

notes.en: Large-scale EnMAP source for demonstrating satellite HSI transfer beyond hand-picked academic scenes.
notes.es: Fuente EnMAP de gran escala para demostrar transferencia satelital HSI mas alla de escenas academicas seleccionadas manualmente.

supervision.label_scope: no product-visible class labels selected
supervision.caveat: Useful for unsupervised transfer only after selected patch IDs and license constraints are documented.

acquisition.license_note: Official EnMAP patch collection requires license/agreement review before redistribution.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Keep collection external; track only selected patch IDs and compact summaries.

repository_strategy.en: Keep the full archive external and track selected labeled scenes plus compact derived summaries for the app.
repository_strategy.es: Mantener el archivo completo externo y rastrear escenas etiquetadas seleccionadas junto con resumenes compactos derivados para la app.

notes.en: Relevant modern open benchmark because it provides 200 calibrated hyperspectral images and pixel-level labels for 38 sea/land/cloud scenes.
notes.es: Benchmark abierto moderno relevante porque entrega 200 imagenes hiperespectrales calibradas y etiquetas por pixel para 38 escenas mar/tierra/nube.

supervision.label_scope: pixel-level sea/land/cloud labels are available for a subset of scenes
supervision.caveat: Use only through selected scenes with documented attribution, split policy, and compact derived assets.

acquisition.license_note: Verify current NTNU/HYPSO attribution and reuse terms before redistributing any derived subset.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Keep archive external; expose only selected scene IDs and compact derivative artifacts.

repository_strategy.en: Do not assume redistributability. Use only after access, license, and redistribution constraints are verified.
repository_strategy.es: No asumir redistribucion. Usar solo despues de verificar acceso, licencia y restricciones de redistribucion.

notes.en: Important urban case because it pairs hyperspectral imagery with LiDAR DSM over a campus and neighboring urban area.
notes.es: Caso urbano importante porque combina imagen hiperespectral con DSM LiDAR sobre un campus y area urbana vecina.

supervision.label_scope: class labels and LiDAR pairing are access-gated candidate metadata
supervision.caveat: No app-visible claim until access terms and redistribution constraints are cleared.

acquisition.license_note: Use only after IEEE GRSS/UH terms and redistribution limits are verified.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Catalog-only unless explicit access and publication permission are obtained.

repository_strategy.en: Do not commit the full archive. Use it only through external download plus small, attribution-preserving derived patches.
repository_strategy.es: No commitear el archivo completo. Usarlo solo mediante descarga externa mas pequenos parches derivados con atribucion preservada.

notes.en: Direct match for wetland demonstrations, but the archive size requires subset-only handling.
notes.es: Coincide directamente con demostraciones de humedales, pero el tamano del archivo exige manejo solo por subconjuntos.

supervision.label_scope: wetland labels require subset extraction and source verification before app use
supervision.caveat: Treat as external research data until compact patches and label semantics are documented.

acquisition.license_note: Archive is too large for Git; verify selected patch license and attribution before derived publication.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Full archive stays external; only small derived patches may become app assets.

datasets.name: Landsat Collection 2 Level-2
datasets.source: USGS Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 Science Products

repository_strategy.en: Use metadata-driven scene queries and small derived tiles. Do not track full Landsat products in Git.
repository_strategy.es: Usar consultas de escenas basadas en metadata y pequenos tiles derivados. No versionar productos Landsat completos en Git.

notes.en: Best suited for vegetation, water, humidity, drought, and temperature index demonstrations when the app adds geospatial ingestion.
notes.es: Adecuado para demostraciones de vegetacion, agua, humedad, sequia e indices de temperatura cuando la app agregue ingestion geoespacial.

supervision.label_scope: query results have no inherent class labels in the current product
supervision.measurement_scope: surface reflectance and temperature products can support derived index workflows
supervision.caveat: Requires geospatial ingestion before it can become a reproducible app dataset.

acquisition.license_note: Use official USGS Landsat access paths and scene metadata; do not track full products in Git.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Publish only small selected tiles and derived index summaries after ingestion exists.

repository_strategy.en: Treat as a manual-acquisition or secondary-reference source unless a stable direct download endpoint is identified.
repository_strategy.es: Tratar como fuente de adquisicion manual o referencia secundaria mientras no se identifique un endpoint de descarga directa estable.

notes.en: Useful laboratory-scale complement to airborne or satellite scenes. It is widely cited as a 31-band visible-range benchmark, but official public access is more brittle than UPV/EHU or MicaSense.
notes.es: Complemento de escala laboratorio util frente a escenas aerotransportadas o satelitales. Es ampliamente citado como benchmark visible de 31 bandas, pero su acceso oficial publico es mas fragil que UPV/EHU o MicaSense.

supervision.label_scope: scene or object labels are candidate metadata; no pixel labels are configured
supervision.caveat: Treat as a laboratory reference source until acquisition and label semantics are reproduced locally.

acquisition.license_note: Verify official access, file layout, citation, and redistribution before ingestion.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: No raw tracking until a stable source manifest exists.

local_status.en: Compact AVIRIS and Sentinel-2 archives downloaded locally; curated samples are tracked as derived JSON
local_status.es: Archivos compactos AVIRIS y Sentinel-2 descargados localmente; muestras curadas versionadas como JSON derivado

repository_strategy.en: Never commit the full multi-gigabyte library. Use the official small ASCII sensor subsets and track only compact material samples.
repository_strategy.es: Nunca commitear la libreria completa multi-GB. Usar subconjuntos ASCII oficiales pequenos por sensor y versionar solo muestras compactas por material.

notes.en: Closer to mineral and clay interpretation workflows than remote-sensing scenes. Excellent for one-dimensional spectral corpora.
notes.es: Mas cercano a flujos de interpretacion mineral y de arcillas que las escenas de teledeteccion. Excelente para corpus espectrales unidimensionales.

supervision.label_scope: material and group labels are available for curated compact samples
supervision.caveat: Nearest-reference matches are evidence, not material identifications.

acquisition.license_note: Use USGS data-release provenance and cite the source; never commit the full multi-GB library.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Track only compact curated samples and source-file metadata.

repository_strategy.en: Keep the library external and extract only small representative slices into the repo.
repository_strategy.es: Mantener la libreria externa y extraer solo pequenos cortes representativos al repo.

notes.en: Valuable when the app needs examples spanning natural and man-made materials, with much richer variability than a single spectral signature.
notes.es: Valiosa cuando la app necesita ejemplos que abarquen materiales naturales y artificiales, con mucha mas variabilidad que una firma espectral unica.

supervision.label_scope: material labels are expected but not yet represented in local derived assets
supervision.caveat: Local metadata now reproduces visible category counts, but no app-visible sample should exist until a session-backed export path and subset redistribution policy are verified.

acquisition.access: public JPL category metadata plus login-gated bulk checkout
acquisition.license_note: Public category metadata is reproducible, but bulk export currently routes through a login form; verify export terms, citation, and subset redistribution before ingestion.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Keep full library external; publish only compact representative slices.

datasets.name: HIDSAG geometallurgy database
datasets.source: HIDSAG: Hyperspectral Image Database for Supervised Analysis in Geometallurgy

repository_strategy.en: Keep full Figshare ZIPs local, version only compact derived metadata and curated spectral exports, and promote selected subset views only after split design and model-card definitions.
repository_strategy.es: Mantener los ZIP completos de Figshare solo en local, versionar solo metadata derivada compacta y exportaciones espectrales curadas, y promover vistas de subconjuntos solo despues de definir splits y model cards.

notes.en: Highest-priority Family D source. Local raw coverage now includes GEOMET, MINERAL1, MINERAL2, GEOCHEM, and PORPHYRY, plus compact derived spectral exports, wavelength metadata, patch-region documents, and supervised local benchmarks at sample, cube, and region levels.
notes.es: Fuente Family D de mayor prioridad. La cobertura cruda local ahora incluye GEOMET, MINERAL1, MINERAL2, GEOCHEM y PORPHYRY, ademas de exportaciones espectrales compactas derivadas, metadata de longitudes de onda, documentos regionales por patches y benchmarks supervisados locales a nivel de muestra, cubo y region.

supervision.label_scope: sample ids and response targets are locally visible across GEOMET, MINERAL1, MINERAL2, GEOCHEM, and PORPHYRY metadata, with supervised subset benchmarks already running
supervision.measurement_scope: geometallurgical, mineralogical, and geochemical responses are locally verified across five subsets; repeated-measurement support now exists for GEOCHEM and PORPHYRY
supervision.caveat: This is now a real local multi-subset source, but no product claim is acceptable until bad-band handling, broader splits, richer documents, metrics, and model cards exist.

acquisition.access: public Figshare collection API and direct download URLs
acquisition.license_note: The article is CC BY 4.0 and the current Figshare subset metadata reports CC0; keep full ZIPs local and publish only compact derived metadata or explicitly approved exports.
acquisition.raw_asset_policy: Keep ZIPs local; version only manifests, compact derived metadata, wavelength-aware summaries, and patch-region exports. GEOMET, MINERAL1, MINERAL2, GEOCHEM, and PORPHYRY are the current downloaded subsets.

reason.en: The full raw scene is large enough that it should stay local-only unless a specific compact export strategy is approved.
reason.es: La escena cruda completa es lo bastante grande como para mantenerse solo localmente salvo que se apruebe una estrategia de exportacion compacta.

reason.en: The Zenodo archive is about 1.3 GB, so it is external-only until curated patches are extracted and documented.
reason.es: El archivo de Zenodo pesa aproximadamente 1.3 GB, por lo que es solo externo hasta extraer y documentar parches curados.

reason.en: The full benchmark is tens of GiB. Use metadata and selected patches, not a committed archive.
reason.es: El benchmark completo pesa decenas de GiB. Usar metadata y parches seleccionados, no un archivo commiteado.
